text.tspan: Run multiple LLM calls IN PARALLEL.
Two distinct shapes, very different uses:
Both improve quality. Both cost K× the tokens.
Sectioning improves SCALE; voting improves RELIABILITY.
Split work into N independent parts.
Each part runs as its own LLM call.
• Analyze K files of a repo at once
• Generate K sections of a report
Run the SAME task K times at temperature.
